---
type: Requirement

name: "Leaf child requirement of the decomposed parent"
status: draft
reqDomain: software
reqClass: system
derivedFrom: [REQ-FXPARENT-001]
breakdownAdr: Decisions::ADR-FX-001
---

The fixture system shall implement a leaf of the decomposed parent; it has no verifying test
case, making it a real coverage gap.
